cards.title: AI-Generated Malware
cards.summary: [P1] AI-generated Slopoly malware is used in Interlock ransomware attacks, with no patch currently available. This threat is highly urgent due to its potential impact on internet-facing systems. Why now: Highly urgent due to potential impact on internet-facing systems. (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Repository Custom Properties
cards.summary: [P2] Actions OIDC tokens now support repository custom properties, which may introduce new security risks if not properly configured.
